Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Acute Hospital Care at Home Patient and Hospital Data Files │ January 2024 │ V 1.0 15 

PRVDR_STATE 

LABEL: Provider State 

DESCRIPTION: The state in which the hospital facility is located. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_STATE 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_STATE 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): Patient and hospital 

SOURCE: AHCAH facility-submitted data (verified by CMS) 

VALUES: Two-character postal state code 

COMMENT: —
